since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.18% · Gold +0.14% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.30%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.30%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +5.04%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +5.04%, MU +4.06%, AMD +3.78%, TER +3.32%, KLAC +3.08%. Laggards: NOW -2.22%, SAP -2.21%, CRM -2.11%, INTU -1.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.97% at $125.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
